title: Application of proteomics to the study of pollination drops.
author: Prior N Little SA Pirone C Gill JE Smith D Han J Hardie D O'Leary SJ Wagner RE Cross T Coulter A Borchers C Olafson RW von Aderkas P
content: S-EPMC4105296 PMC4105296 Application of proteomics to the study of pollination drops. Pollination drops are a formative component in gymnosperm pollen-ovule interactions. Proteomics offers a direct method for the discovery of proteins associated with this early stage of sexual reproduction
